query:
SELECT 
  c.code, 
  c.title,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.content IS NOT NULL AND l.content != '' AND LENGTH(l.content) > 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as complete_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.content IS NULL OR l.content = '' OR LENGTH(l.content) <= 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incomplete_lessons
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT 
  c.code, 
  c.title,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.content IS NOT NULL AND l.content != '' AND LENGTH(l.content) > 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as complete_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.content IS NULL OR l.content = '' OR LENGTH(l.content) <= 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incomplete_lessons
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;
